```{r biplots-scn-sds}
  palette       = NULL,
  title         = "PC1 vs PC2 by Site"
) + ggplot2::labs(x = axis_labels$x,
    y = axis_labels$y)

p_trt | p_fv 
p_scn | p_site
```

---

# 8. Correlation matrix (sanity check on features)

Inspect correlations among numeric predictors used in PCA:

```{r corrplot, warning=FALSE}
# ID-like / outcome variables to exclude from PCA feature space
id_like <- c(
  "yield_mtha","treatment_effect_fdx","treatment_effect_yield","yield_bua","yield_diff_bua",
  "proj_price_kg","proj_price_bu","harv_price_kg",
  "harv_price_bu","diff_price_bua", "diff_price_kgha"
)

# Metadata we want for colouring / faceting later
meta_cols <- c("year", "location", "mean_fv_ratio_int", "soil_p_h",
               "fdx_level", "scn_level", "product","sds_tol")

# All numeric predictors
corr_df <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of(intersect(names(.), id_like)))

dplyr::glimpse(corr_df)

keep <- complete.cases(
  df[, meta_cols],
  corr_df
)

df_nona    <- df[keep, , drop = FALSE]
corr_df  <- corr_df[keep, , drop = FALSE]

# Optional: rename yield_diff if you prefer a clearer name
# df_nona     <- dplyr::rename(df_nona, treatment_effect_kgha = yield_diff)
# num_df_nona <- dplyr::rename(num_df_nona, treatment_effect_kgha = yield_diff)

dim(df_nona)
dim(corr_df)

# Set file path and export parameters
png(
  filename = "correlation_plot.png",   # output file name
  width = 7,                           # width in inches
  height = 6,                          # height in inches
  units = "in",
  res = 600                            # resolution in DPI (300–600 typical for print)
)

make_corrplot <- function(
  df,
  filename = NULL,                 # e.g., "fig.png", "fig.tiff", "fig.pdf", "fig.svg" (or NULL to just draw)
  width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600,
  order = "hclust",
  y_shift = -0.20,                 # move stars down within each cell
  legend_inset = -0.15,            # push legend below plot
  number_cex = 0.8, star_cex = 0.7,
  tl_srt = 45, tl_col = "black",
  diag = FALSE
) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(df) || is.matrix(df))
  if (!requireNamespace("corrplot", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'corrplot' is required.")
  }

  # --- p-value helper ---
  cor.mtest <- function(mat, ...) {
    mat <- as.matrix(mat)
    n <- ncol(mat)
    p.mat <- matrix(NA, n, n); diag(p.mat) <- 0
    for (i in 1:(n - 1)) for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      tmp <- cor.test(mat[, i], mat[, j], ...)
      p.mat[i, j] <- p.mat[j, i] <- tmp$p.value
    }
    colnames(p.mat) <- rownames(p.mat) <- colnames(mat)
    p.mat
  }

  # --- correlations & p-values ---
  cor_mat <- cor(df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  p_mat   <- cor.mtest(df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

  # --- lock corrplot's order & reorder both matrices ---
  ord <- corrplot::corrMatOrder(cor_mat, order = order)
  cor_re <- cor_mat[ord, ord]
  p_re   <- p_mat[ord, ord]
  n <- ncol(cor_re)

  # --- open device if saving ---
  dev_open <- FALSE
  if (!is.null(filename)) {
    ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(filename))
    if (ext %in% c("png", "tif", "tiff")) {
      if (ext == "png") {
        png(filename, width = width, height = height, units = units, res = res)
      } else {
        tiff(filename, width = width, height = height, units = units, res = res, compression = "lzw")
      }
      dev_open <- TRUE
    } else if (ext == "pdf") {
      pdf(filename, width = width, height = height)
      dev_open <- TRUE
    } else if (ext == "svg") {
      svg(filename, width = width, height = height)
      dev_open <- TRUE
    } else {
      stop("Unsupported file extension: ", ext)
    }
  }

  # --- draw ---
  op <- par(mar = c(4, 0, 2, 0)); on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)
  par(xpd = TRUE)

  # 1) base map with numbers
  corrplot::corrplot(
    cor_re,
    type = "upper",
    order = "original",
    tl.col = tl_col,
    tl.srt = tl_srt,
    addCoef.col = "black",
    number.cex = number_cex,
    diag = diag
  )

  # 2) overlay significance stars (or "ns"), shifted down
  stars <- ifelse(p_re < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(p_re < 0.01,  "**",
           ifelse(p_re < 0.05,  "*",  "ns")))
  for (i in 1:n) for (j in 1:n) {
    if (i < j) {
      text(x = j, y = n - i + 1 + y_shift, labels = stars[i, j],
           cex = star_cex, col = "black",size=0.75)
    }
  }

  # 3) single-line legend below the figure
  legend(
  "bottom",
  inset = 0,
  horiz = TRUE,
  legend = c(
    expression("***" ~ italic(P) < 0.001),
    expression("**" ~ italic(P) < 0.01),
    expression("*" ~ italic(P) < 0.05),
    expression(phantom() ^ "ns" ~ italic(P) >= 0.05)
  ),
  bty = "n",
  text.col = "black",
  cex = 0.9,
  x.intersp = 0.8
)


  if (dev_open) dev.off()

  invisible(list(cor = cor_re, p = p_re, order = ord))
}

# Just draw to the current device
make_corrplot(corr_df)

# Save a high-res TIFF for a journal
make_corrplot(corr_df, filename = "corrplot.tiff", width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600)

# Save a vector PDF for slides
make_corrplot(corr_df, filename = "corrplot.pdf", width = 7, height = 6)

# Nudge stars a tad more down and tighten legend spacing
make_corrplot(corr_df, filename = "corrplot.png", y_shift = -0.25, legend_inset = -0.18)

```

---

# 9. K-means clustering on PCA scores

We can cluster plots in the **PC1–PCk** space to identify multivariate patterns.

Here we use the first 4 PCs and explore different values of k.

```{r kmeans-elbow}
pc_cols <- paste0("PC", 1:4)
pca_mat <- pr$x[, pc_cols, drop = FALSE]

set.seed(1)
wss <- map_dbl(1:12, ~kmeans(pca_mat, centers = .x, nstart = 25)$tot.withinss)

data.frame(k = 1:12, wss = wss) %>%
  ggplot(aes(k, wss)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Elbow plot for k-means (PC1–PC4)", x = "k", y = "Total within-cluster SS") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Silhouette-based guidance:

```{r kmeans-silhouette}
sil_df <- map_df(2:12, function(k) {
  km <- kmeans(pca_mat, centers = k, nstart = 25)
  ss <- cluster::silhouette(km$cluster, dist(pca_mat))
  tibble(k = k, avg_sil = mean(ss[, "sil_width"]))
})

ggplot(sil_df, aes(k, avg_sil)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Average silhouette vs k", x = "k", y = "Avg silhouette width") +
  theme_minimal()
```

> Choose k where:
> - The elbow plot starts to flatten  
> - The silhouette width is relatively high and stable  

For illustration, we’ll use `k = 10` (adjust after inspecting the plots).

```{r kmeans-final}
k <- 10
set.seed(1)
km <- kmeans(pca_mat, centers = k, nstart = 50)

pca_scores_k <- pca_scores %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(km$cluster))

# Clusters by location
ggplot(pca_scores_k, aes(PC1, PC2, color = location)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(
    title = glue("k-means (k = {k}) on PCA scores – colored by location"),
    x = xlab_pc12,
    y = ylab_pc12
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_equal()

# Clusters by SCN level
ggplot(pca_scores_k, aes(PC1, PC2, color = scn_level)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(
    title = glue("k-means (k = {k}) on PCA scores – colored by SCN level"),
    x = xlab_pc12,
    y = ylab_pc12
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_equal()
```

#Cluster composition summaries:

```{r cluster-composition}
# By location
pca_scores_k %>%
  dplyr::count(cluster, location) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(pct)) %>%
  print(n = 100)

# By SCN level
pca_scores_k %>%
  dplyr::count(cluster, scn_level) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(pct)) %>%
  print(n = 100)
```

---

# 10. Optional: launching the interactive PCA GUI

There are two options:

1. Use the **generic GUI** from the separate vignette (`run_pca_gui()`), applied to this dataset  
2. Use the more specialized **SCN/SDS PCA GUI app** (`pca_gui_app.R`) that expects `pr` and `df_nona`

## 10.1 Generic PCA GUI on the SCN/SDS dataset

After sourcing the `run_pca_gui()` function (from the other vignette or a separate R script), you can run:

```r
# Treat df_nona as the working dataset:
run_pca_gui(df_nona, group_var = "scn_level")
```

or explore other groupings:

```r
run_pca_gui(df_nona, group_var = "mean_fv_ratio_int")
run_pca_gui(df_nona, group_var = "location")
```

## 10.2 Specialized SCN/SDS PCA GUI

If you have saved the dedicated app as `pca_gui_app.R` (as in our previous work), and it expects:

- `pr` = PCA object  
- `df_nona` = metadata aligned with `pr$x`  

then, in the same R session where this R Markdown is run, you can launch:

```r
source("pca_gui_app.R")
```

This will open a Shiny app with:

- Multiple grouping options (SCN level, SDS level, year, location, product)  
- Journal-style presets (e.g., Plant Disease) for figure aesthetics  
- A multi-panel publication figure builder

### LMM chunk taken from "C:/Longitudinal/sds_longitudinal_seedtrt.Rmd"
```{r}
# Removed 3 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.
#optimized yield model
y_mod_op<-lmer(yield_mtha~mean_fv_ratio_int+(1|scn_count_rep)+fdx_std+soil_p_h+product+(1|year:location:rep:sds_tol),data=df_mod,na.action=na.omit)
summary(y_mod_op) 
joint_tests(y_mod_op) #optimized for modeling seed trt product effects
#drop1(y_mod_op) #looks good
plot(y_mod_op)
lsmeans<-emmeans(y_mod_op,"mean_fv_ratio_int") #calculates lsmeans
cld(lsmeans,Letters=letters,alpha=.05) #default is Tukey
#pairs(lsmeans) #all pairwise comparisons
weights(lsmeans)

#optimized FDX model
fdx_mod_op<-lmer(fdx_std~mean_fv_ratio_int+scn_count_rep+product+(1|year:location:soil_p_h:rep:product:sds_tol),data=df_mod,na.action=na.omit)
summary(fdx_mod_op) 
joint_tests(fdx_mod_op)
#drop1(fdx_mod_op) #looks good
plot(fdx_mod_op)
lsmeans<-emmeans(fdx_mod_op,"mean_fv_ratio_int") #calculates lsmeans
cld(lsmeans,Letters=letters,alpha=.05) #default is Tukey
#pairs(lsmeans) #all pairwise comparisons
weights(lsmeans)

#optimized yield model
price_mod_op<-lmer(usd_ha~mean_fv_ratio_int+product+yield_mtha+(1|year:location:scn_count_rep:soil_p_h:rep:sds_tol),data=df_mod,na.action=na.omit)
#summary(y_mod_op) 
joint_tests(price_mod_op) #optimized for modeling seed trt product effects
#drop1(price_mod_op) #looks good
plot(price_mod_op)
lsmeans<-emmeans(price_mod_op,~ product) #calculates lsmeans -- OK, this is actually informative
cld(lsmeans,Letters=letters,alpha=.05) #default is Tukey
pairs(lsmeans) #all pairwise comparisons
weights(lsmeans)

```


### THIS IS THE SAUCE ###
---
```{r include=FALSE}
# Removed 10 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.
## ---------- libraries ----------

## IMPORTANT: in your session you must have:
##   num_df_nona = numeric features used for PCA
##   df_nona     = metadata (same row order as num_df_nona)

## ---------- PCA variable choices ----------
pca_var_choices <- colnames(num_df_nona)

# Robust PCA: global baseline -----------------------------------------------
preproc <- recipes::recipe(~ ., data = num_df_nona) %>%
  recipes::step_impute_median(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  recipes::step_zv(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  recipes::step_nzv(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  recipes::step_normalize(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  recipes::prep()

X <- recipes::juice(preproc, composition = "data.frame")
stopifnot(nrow(X) > 0, ncol(X) > 1)

pr <- prcomp(as.matrix(X), center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE, retx = TRUE)

## ---------- helper: journal style presets ----------
apply_style_preset <- function(p, preset = "Default") {
  base <- theme(
    text = element_text(family = "", colour = "black"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

  if (preset == "Plant Disease") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Phytopathology") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Crop Protection") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Nature-style") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "plain"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "plain"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else {
    p + theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  }
}

## ---------- UI ----------
group_choices <- c(
  "No grouping"           = "none",
  "F. virguliforme level" = "mean_fv_ratio_int",
  "SCN level"             = "scn_level",
  "FDX level"             = "fdx_level",
  "Year"                  = "year",
  "Site"                  = "location",
  "Seed treatment"        = "product"
)

style_choices <- c(
  "Default",
  "Plant Disease",
  "Phytopathology",
  "Crop Protection",
  "Nature-style"
)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Interactive PCA Explorer + Clustering & Diagnostics"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4("Interactive PCA (PC1 vs PC2)"),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "year_sel",
        label   = "Select year(s):",
        choices = sort(unique(df_nona$year)),
        selected = sort(unique(df_nona$year))
      ),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "loc_sel",
        label   = "Select location(s):",
        choices = sort(unique(df_nona$location)),
        selected = sort(unique(df_nona$location))
      ),

      radioButtons(
        inputId = "pca_scope",
        label   = "PCA basis:",
        choices = c(
          "All observations (fixed PCA on full dataset)" = "all",
          "Selected year(s) & location(s) only (recompute PCA)" = "selected"
        ),
        selected = "selected"
      ),

      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "pca_vars",
        label   = "Numeric covariates for PCA (selected mode):",
        choices = pca_var_choices,
        selected = pca_var_choices
      ),

      selectInput(
        "group_var", "Color / group by (interactive):",
        choices = group_choices,
        selected = "scn_level"
      ),
      checkboxInput("show_ellipses", "Show ellipses (interactive)", value = TRUE),
      selectInput("ellipse_type", "Ellipse type:",
                  choices = c("Normal" = "norm", "t-distribution" = "t"),
                  selected = "t"),

      checkboxInput(
        "show_interactive_arrows",
        "Show loadings arrows (PC1 & PC2)",
        value = FALSE
      ),

      sliderInput("alpha", "Point alpha:", min = 0.2, max = 1, value = 0.8, step = 0.05),
      sliderInput("point_size", "Point size:", min = 1.5, max = 4, value = 2.5, step = 0.25),

      hr(),
      h4("Style & export"),
      selectInput("style_preset", "Style preset:",
                  choices = style_choices,
                  selected = "Plant Disease"),
      textInput("pub_obj_name", "Save interactive PCA as object:", "pca_pub_plot"),
      actionButton("save_pub_to_env", "Export single plot to Environment"),

      hr(),
      h4("Clustering on PCs"),
      sliderInput(
        inputId = "kmeans_k",
        label   = "K-means: number of clusters (k)",
        min     = 2, max = 10, value = 3, step = 1
      ),
      sliderInput(
        inputId = "kmeans_npc",
        label   = "K-means: # PCs used",
        min     = 1, max = 6, value = 3, step = 1
      ),
      sliderInput(
        inputId = "hcpc_k",
        label   = "HCPC-style (Ward) clusters (k)",
        min     = 2, max = 10, value = 3, step = 1
      ),
      sliderInput(
        inputId = "hcpc_npc",
        label   = "HCPC: # PCs used",
        min     = 1, max = 6, value = 3, step = 1
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        inputId = "show_cluster_centers",
        label   = "Show cluster centroids on cluster plots",
        value   = TRUE
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel(
          "Interactive PCA",
          plotlyOutput("pcaPlot", height = "650px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Diagnostics & Clusters",
          h4("PCA diagnostics"),
          plotOutput("pca_scree", height = "250px"),
          plotOutput("pca_year_overlay", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_year_facet", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_scn_facet", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_fdx_facet", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_product_facet", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_loadings_heatmap", height = "350px"),

          hr(),
          h4("Density ellipses (2D density in PC space)"),
          plotOutput("pca_density", height = "300px"),

          hr(),
          h4("Cluster diagnostics (on active PCA)"),
          plotOutput("pca_kmeans", height = "300px"),
          plotOutput("pca_hcpc", height   = "300px"),
          plotOutput("hcpc_dendrogram", height = "300px"),

          hr(),
          h4("Save diagnostics"),
          fluidRow(
            column(
              width = 4,
              h5("Scree plot"),
              textInput(
                inputId = "scree_obj_name",
                label   = "Object name (Environment):",
                value   = "pca_scree_plot"
              ),
              actionButton(
                inputId = "save_scree_to_env",
                label   = "💾 Save scree to Environment"
              )
            ),
            column(
              width = 4,
              h5("Loadings heatmap"),
              textInput(
                inputId = "loadings_obj_name",
                label   = "Object name (Environment):",
                value   = "pca_loadings_heatmap"
              ),
              actionButton(
                inputId = "save_loadings_to_env",
                label   = "💾 Save loadings heatmap to Environment"
              )
            ),
            column(
              width = 4,
              h5("K-means clusters plot"),
              textInput(
                inputId = "kmeans_obj_name",
                label   = "Object name (Environment):",
                value   = "pca_kmeans_plot"
              ),
              actionButton(
                inputId = "save_kmeans_to_env",
                label   = "💾 Save k-means plot to Environment"
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

## ---------- SERVER ----------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # ---- indices for selected years & locations ----
  selected_idx <- reactive({
    idx <- seq_len(nrow(df_nona))

    if (!is.null(input$year_sel) && length(input$year_sel) > 0) {
      idx <- idx[df_nona$year[idx] %in% input$year_sel]
    }

    if (!is.null(input$loc_sel) && length(input$loc_sel) > 0) {
      idx <- idx[df_nona$location[idx] %in% input$loc_sel]
    }

    idx
  })

  # ---- recompute PCA on selected subset using selected covariates ----
  pr_selected <- reactive({
    req(input$pca_scope == "selected")
    idx <- selected_idx()

    validate(
      need(length(idx) > 2, "Not enough observations for PCA with current year/location selection.")
    )

    vars <- input$pca_vars
    vars <- intersect(vars, colnames(num_df_nona))
    validate(
      need(length(vars) >= 2, "Select at least two numeric covariates for PCA.")
    )

    num_sub <- num_df_nona[idx, vars, drop = FALSE]
    validate(
      need(nrow(num_sub) > 2, "Not enough observations after filtering for PCA.")
    )

    pre_rec <- recipes::recipe(~ ., data = num_sub) %>%
      recipes::step_impute_median(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
      recipes::step_zv(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
      recipes::step_nzv(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
      recipes::step_normalize(recipes::all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
      recipes::prep()

    X_sub <- recipes::juice(pre_rec, composition = "data.frame")
    prcomp(as.matrix(X_sub), center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE, retx = TRUE)
  })

  # ---- active PCA object ----
  pr_active <- reactive({
    if (input$pca_scope == "all") {
      pr
    } else {
      pr_selected()
    }
  })

  # ---- PCA scores used for clustering (all PCs, active PCA) ----
  pca_scores_for_clustering <- reactive({
    pr_use <- pr_active()
    idx    <- selected_idx()

    if (length(idx) == 0) {
      return(matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = 0))
    }

    if (input$pca_scope == "all") {
      sc_full <- pr_use$x[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    } else {
      sc_full <- pr_use$x
    }
    sc_full
  })

  # ---- PCA data (PC1/PC2 + metadata) ----
  pca_data <- reactive({
    pr_use <- pr_active()
    idx    <- selected_idx()

    if (length(idx) == 0) {
      return(df_nona[0, , drop = FALSE] %>%
               mutate(PC1 = numeric(0), PC2 = numeric(0))[, c("PC1","PC2", names(df_nona))])
    }

    if (input$pca_scope == "all") {
      scores <- as.data.frame(pr_use$x)[idx, 1:2, drop = FALSE]
    } else {
      scores <- as.data.frame(pr_use$x)[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]
    }

    scores <- scores %>%
      dplyr::rename(PC1 = 1, PC2 = 2) %>%
      dplyr::bind_cols(df_nona[idx, , drop = FALSE])

    scores
  })

  # ---- Single ggplot object for PCA scatter ----
  pub_plot_single <- reactive({
    dat    <- pca_data()
    pr_use <- pr_active()

    if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
      return(
        ggplot() +
          annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0,
                   label = "No data for selected year(s) / location(s)",
                   size = 5) +
          theme_void()
      )
    }

    if (input$group_var == "none") {
      hab <- NULL
      title_suffix <- "No grouping"
    } else {
      hab <- forcats::fct_explicit_na(dat[[input$group_var]], na_level = "NA")
      title_suffix <- paste("colored by", input$group_var)
    }

    pc_var <- round(summary(pr_use)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100, 1)
    xlab <- paste0("PC1 (", pc_var[1], "%)")
    ylab <- paste0("PC2 (", pc_var[2], "%)")

    if (is.null(hab)) {
      g <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
        geom_point(alpha = input$alpha, size = input$point_size) +
        coord_equal()
    } else {
      pal <- hcl.colors(nlevels(hab), "Dynamic")

      g <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = hab)) +
        geom_point(alpha = input$alpha, size = input$point_size) +
        scale_color_manual(values = pal, name = NULL) +
        coord_equal()

      if (isTRUE(input$show_ellipses)) {
        g <- g +
          stat_ellipse(
            aes(group = hab),
            type = input$ellipse_type,
            level = 0.95,
            linewidth = 0.7,
            show.legend = FALSE
          )
      }
    }

    if (isTRUE(input$show_interactive_arrows)) {
      if (!is.null(pr_use$rotation) && ncol(pr_use$rotation) >= 2) {
        loadings <- as.data.frame(pr_use$rotation[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]) %>%
          rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
          rename(lx = 2, ly = 3)

        range_x <- range(dat$PC1, na.rm = TRUE)
        range_y <- range(dat$PC2, na.rm = TRUE)
        scale_factor <- 0.7 * min(diff(range_x), diff(range_y))
        max_loading  <- max(abs(c(loadings$lx, loadings$ly)), na.rm = TRUE)

        if (is.finite(max_loading) && max_loading > 0 &&
            is.finite(scale_factor) && scale_factor > 0) {
          loadings <- loadings %>%
            mutate(
              ax = lx / max_loading * scale_factor,
              ay = ly / max_loading * scale_factor
            )

          g <- g +
            geom_segment(
              data = loadings,
              aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = ax, yend = ay),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.18, "cm")),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.3
            ) +
            geom_text(
              data = loadings,
              aes(x = ax, y = ay, label = variable),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              size = 3,
              vjust = 1.1
            )
        }
      }
    }

    g <- g +
      labs(
        title = paste("PCA (PC1 vs PC2) –", title_suffix),
        x = xlab,
        y = ylab
      )

    g <- apply_style_preset(g, input$style_preset)
    g
  })

  # ---- Interactive PCA plot (plotly) ----
  output$pcaPlot <- renderPlotly({
    dat <- pca_data()
    g   <- pub_plot_single()

    tooltip_vars <- c("PC1", "PC2", input$group_var)
    if ("location" %in% names(dat)) tooltip_vars <- c(tooltip_vars, "location")
    if ("year" %in% names(dat))     tooltip_vars <- c(tooltip_vars, "year")

    ggplotly(g, tooltip = intersect(tooltip_vars, names(dat)))
  })

  # ---- Export single ggplot ----
  observeEvent(input$save_pub_to_env, {
    g <- pub_plot_single()
    obj_name <- input$pub_obj_name %||% "pca_pub_plot"
    if (!nzchar(obj_name)) obj_name <- "pca_pub_plot"
    assign(obj_name, g, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    showNotification(
      paste("Exported interactive PCA plot as object:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  # ---- Scree plot ----
  pca_scree_plot <- reactive({
    pr_use <- pr_active()
    var_expl <- pr_use$sdev^2 / sum(pr_use$sdev^2)

    df <- data.frame(
      PC  = factor(paste0("PC", seq_along(var_expl)),
                   levels = paste0("PC", seq_along(var_expl))),
      var = var_expl
    )

    ggplot(df, aes(x = PC, y = var)) +
      geom_col() +
      geom_point() +
      geom_line(group = 1) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
      labs(
        title = "Scree plot (active PCA)",
        x     = "Principal component",
        y     = "Variance explained"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$pca_scree <- renderPlot({
    pca_scree_plot()
  })

  # ---- Overlay PC1 vs PC2 colored by year ----
  output$pca_year_overlay <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    req("year" %in% names(dat))

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = factor(year))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "PC1 vs PC2 colored by year (overlay)",
        color = "Year"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  # ---- Facets by year / SCN level / FDX level / product ----
  output$pca_year_facet <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    req("year" %in% names(dat))

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = factor(year))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ year) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "PC1 vs PC2 by year",
        color = "Year"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$pca_scn_facet <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    req("scn_level" %in% names(dat))

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = scn_level)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ scn_level) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "PC1 vs PC2 by SCN level",
        color = "SCN level"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$pca_fdx_facet <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    req("fdx_level" %in% names(dat))

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = fdx_level)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ fdx_level) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "PC1 vs PC2 by FDX level",
        color = "FDX level"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$pca_product_facet <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    req("product" %in% names(dat))

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = product)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ product) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "PC1 vs PC2 by seed treatment (product)",
        color = "Product"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  # ---- Loadings heatmap ----
  pca_loadings_plot <- reactive({
    pr_use <- pr_active()
    n_pc <- min(6L, ncol(pr_use$rotation))
    loadings <- as.data.frame(pr_use$rotation[, 1:n_pc, drop = FALSE]) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols      = -variable,
        names_to  = "PC",
        values_to = "loading"
      )

    ggplot(loadings, aes(x = PC, y = variable, fill = loading)) +
      geom_tile() +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low  = "#2166ac",
        mid  = "white",
        high = "#b2182b",
        midpoint = 0
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "PCA loadings (active PCA)",
        x     = "Principal component",
        y     = "Variable",
        fill  = "Loading"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7)
      )
  })

  output$pca_loadings_heatmap <- renderPlot({
    pca_loadings_plot()
  })

  # ---- Density ellipses via 2D density in PC space ----
  output$pca_density <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 2, "Not enough data for density plot.")
    )

    ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
      stat_density_2d(
        aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
        geom  = "polygon",
        alpha = 0.4,
        color = NA
      ) +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C") +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = "2D density in PC1–PC2 space",
        fill  = "Density\nlevel"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  # ---- Save diagnostics to Environment ----
  observeEvent(input$save_scree_to_env, {
    g <- pca_scree_plot()
    obj_name <- input$scree_obj_name
    if (is.null(obj_name) || !nzchar(obj_name)) {
      obj_name <- "pca_scree_plot"
    }
    assign(obj_name, g, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    showNotification(
      paste("Saved scree plot as object:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$save_loadings_to_env, {
    g <- pca_loadings_plot()
    obj_name <- input$loadings_obj_name
    if (is.null(obj_name) || !nzchar(obj_name)) {
      obj_name <- "pca_loadings_heatmap"
    }
    assign(obj_name, g, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    showNotification(
      paste("Saved loadings heatmap as object:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  # ---------- K-means clustering on PCs ----------
  kmeans_clusters <- reactive({
    scores <- pca_scores_for_clustering()
    validate(
      need(nrow(scores) > 0, "No data for clustering with current filters."),
      need(nrow(scores) >= input$kmeans_k,
           "Not enough observations for requested k in k-means.")
    )

    npcs <- min(input$kmeans_npc, ncol(scores))
    validate(
      need(npcs >= 1, "Not enough PCs for k-means clustering.")
    )

    set.seed(123)  # deterministic
    km <- kmeans(scores[, 1:npcs, drop = FALSE], centers = input$kmeans_k)
    km$cluster
  })

  output$pca_kmeans <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 0, "No data for k-means plot.")
    )

    cl <- kmeans_clusters()
    validate(
      need(length(cl) == nrow(dat),
           "Internal mismatch between clustering and PCA data.")
    )

    dat$kmeans_cluster <- factor(cl)

    p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = kmeans_cluster)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = glue("K-means clustering on PCs (k = {input$kmeans_k})"),
        color = "Cluster"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()

    if (isTRUE(input$show_cluster_centers)) {
      centers <- dat %>%
        group_by(kmeans_cluster) %>%
        summarise(PC1 = mean(PC1, na.rm = TRUE),
                  PC2 = mean(PC2, na.rm = TRUE),
                  .groups = "drop")

      p <- p +
        geom_point(
          data = centers,
          aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
          size = 4,
          shape = 21,
          fill = "white",
          color = "black",
          stroke = 1
        ) +
        geom_text(
          data = centers,
          aes(label = kmeans_cluster),
          vjust = -1,
          fontface = "bold"
        )
    }

    p
  })

  observeEvent(input$save_kmeans_to_env, {
    g <- isolate({
      dat <- pca_data()
      cl  <- kmeans_clusters()
      dat$kmeans_cluster <- factor(cl)

      p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = kmeans_cluster)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
        coord_equal() +
        labs(
          title = glue("K-means clustering on PCs (k = {input$kmeans_k})"),
          color = "Cluster"
        ) +
        theme_minimal()

      if (isTRUE(input$show_cluster_centers)) {
        centers <- dat %>%
          group_by(kmeans_cluster) %>%
          summarise(PC1 = mean(PC1, na.rm = TRUE),
                    PC2 = mean(PC2, na.rm = TRUE),
                    .groups = "drop")

        p <- p +
          geom_point(
            data = centers,
            aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
            size = 4,
            shape = 21,
            fill = "white",
            color = "black",
            stroke = 1
          ) +
          geom_text(
            data = centers,
            aes(label = kmeans_cluster),
            vjust = -1,
            fontface = "bold"
          )
      }
      p
    })

    obj_name <- input$kmeans_obj_name
    if (is.null(obj_name) || !nzchar(obj_name)) {
      obj_name <- "pca_kmeans_plot"
    }

    assign(obj_name, g, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    showNotification(
      paste("Saved k-means PCA plot as object:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  # ---------- HCPC-style (Ward) clustering on PCs ----------
  hcpc_res <- reactive({
    scores <- pca_scores_for_clustering()
    validate(
      need(nrow(scores) > 0, "No data for HCPC-style clustering."),
      need(nrow(scores) >= input$hcpc_k,
           "Not enough observations for requested k in HCPC.")
    )

    npcs <- min(input$hcpc_npc, ncol(scores))
    validate(
      need(npcs >= 1, "Not enough PCs for HCPC clustering.")
    )

    X <- scores[, 1:npcs, drop = FALSE]
    d <- dist(X)
    hc <- hclust(d, method = "ward.D2")
    cl <- cutree(hc, k = input$hcpc_k)

    list(
      hclust  = hc,
      cluster = cl
    )
  })

  output$pca_hcpc <- renderPlot({
    dat <- pca_data()
    validate(
      need(nrow(dat) > 0, "No data for HCPC-style cluster plot.")
    )

    res <- hcpc_res()
    cl  <- res$cluster
    validate(
      need(length(cl) == nrow(dat),
           "Internal mismatch between HCPC clustering and PCA data.")
    )

    dat$hcpc_cluster <- factor(cl)

    p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = hcpc_cluster)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
      coord_equal() +
      labs(
        title = glue("HCPC-style clustering (Ward on PCs, k = {input$hcpc_k})"),
        color = "Cluster"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()

    if (isTRUE(input$show_cluster_centers)) {
      centers <- dat %>%
        group_by(hcpc_cluster) %>%
        summarise(PC1 = mean(PC1, na.rm = TRUE),
                  PC2 = mean(PC2, na.rm = TRUE),
                  .groups = "drop")

      p <- p +
        geom_point(
          data = centers,
          aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
          size = 4,
          shape = 21,
          fill = "white",
          color = "black",
          stroke = 1
        ) +
        geom_text(
          data = centers,
          aes(label = hcpc_cluster),
          vjust = -1,
          fontface = "bold"
        )
    }

    p
  })

  output$hcpc_dendrogram <- renderPlot({
    res <- hcpc_res()
    hc  <- res$hclust

    plot(hc,
         main = glue("HCPC-style dendrogram (Ward on first {input$hcpc_npc} PCs)"),
         xlab = "", sub = "", cex = 0.5)
    rect.hclust(hc, k = input$hcpc_k, border = 2:6)
  })
}

###---RUN THE GUI---###
shinyApp(ui, server)

```

### this chunk calls the exported correlation matrix plot from the gui ###

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pca_pub_plot_fv<- pca_pub_plot_fv +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = pal_scn, name = "Treatment") + 
  #ylim(-4.5,7.75) +
  #xlim(-3.5,4) +
  labs(x = "PC1 (34.1%): FDX↑, F. virguliforme↑, Yield↓", 
      y = "PC2 (28.7%): SCN↓, F. virguliforme↑, FDX↓", 
      title="PC Biplot: F. virguliforme Level") +
      theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
      axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.9)) +
      theme(legend.position = c(0.08,0.15))

pca_pub_plot_fv

        #height   = 6,
       # units    = "in",
        #dpi      = 600)
```

```{r}
  pca_pub_plot_yr +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()),
  pca_pub_plot_loc+

    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()),

```

---

# 11. Summary

This longitudinal PCA workflow for SCN / SDS seed treatment trials:

- Standardizes and reduces a rich set of agronomic and disease variables  
- Highlights how **SCN level**, **SDS pressure (F. virguliforme)**, and **location** drive multivariate structure  
- Provides both **static**, publication-ready figures and an **interactive GUI** for deeper exploration.

You can reuse this template across years, crops, or pathogen systems by:

- Updating the data import path  
- Adjusting variable names in `meta_cols`, `id_like`, and the SCN/SDS definitions  
- Re-tuning clustering and interpretation sections.

---

### CORRELATION ANALYSIS GUI ###
```{r message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
# Removed 4 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.
## ---------- libraries ----------
# install.packages(c("shiny","corrplot","dplyr","forcats","polycor","vcd","vcdExtra","DescTools"))

## IMPORTANT:
## You must have df_nona in your session with at least:
##   - year
##   - SiteYear
##   - product  (levels like "Base", "ILEVO", "Saltro")
##   - yield_mtha, sds_tol, mean_fv_ratio, scn_count_rep, fdx
##   - soil_pH OR soil_p_h (optional)

## ---------- helper functions (with FIXED eta_with_p_group) ----------
is_binary_factor <- function(x) is.factor(x) && nlevels(x) == 2
is_ordinal       <- function(x) is.ordered(x) && nlevels(x) == 10
is_unordered     <- function(x) is.factor(x) && !is_ordinal(x)

# residualize numeric by group
resid_by_group <- function(x, group) {
  if (!is.numeric(x)) return(x)
  if (is.null(group)) return(x)
  # keep length(x) by reinserting NA residuals in dropped rows
  resid(lm(x ~ group, na.action = na.exclude))
}

# ---------- eta with OPTIONAL group (FIXED) ----------
eta_with_p_group <- function(num, fac, group = NULL) {
  fac <- droplevels(fac)

  # base mask: y and g not NA
  ok <- !is.na(num) & !is.na(fac)
  if (!is.null(group)) {
    ok <- ok & !is.na(group)
  }

  num   <- num[ok]
  fac   <- fac[ok]
  group <- if (!is.null(group)) group[ok] else NULL

  # not enough data? bail out
  if (length(num) < 2 || nlevels(fac) < 2) {
    return(list(stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
  }

  if (is.null(group)) {
    # No stratification: standard one-way ANOVA
    dd  <- data.frame(y = num, g = fac)
    fit <- aov(y ~ g, data = dd)
  } else {
    # With group / blocking factor
    dd  <- data.frame(y = num, g = fac, grp = group)
    fit <- aov(y ~ g + grp, data = dd)
  }

  tb <- summary(fit)[[1]]

  SS_g  <- tb["g","Sum Sq"]
  SS_e  <- tb["Residuals","Sum Sq"]
  eta2p <- SS_g / (SS_g + SS_e)
  pval  <- tb["g","Pr(>F)"]

  list(stat = sqrt(max(0, eta2p)), p = pval)
}

# Cramér's V
cramer_v <- function(x, y) {
  tab <- table(x, y)
  chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
  n   <- sum(tab)
  r   <- nrow(tab); c <- ncol(tab)
  V   <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r, c) - 1)))
  list(stat = V, p = chi$p.value)
}

cmh_or_cramer <- function(x, y, group) {
  if (is.null(group)) return(cramer_v(x, y))

  # binary-binary: Mantel–Haenszel
  if (is_binary_factor(x) && is_binary_factor(y)) {
    arr <- table(group, x, y)     # 3-way table: strata x 2 x 2
    if (length(dim(arr)) == 3 &&
        dim(arr)[2] == 2 && dim(arr)[3] == 2) {
      cmh <- suppressWarnings(mantelhaen.test(arr))
      or  <- as.numeric(cmh$estimate)
      fx  <- if (is.finite(or) && or > 0) abs(log(or)) else 0
      stat <- fx / (1 + fx)
      return(list(stat = stat, p = cmh$p.value))
    }
  }

  # generalized CMH if available
  if (requireNamespace("vcd", quietly = TRUE) &&
      requireNamespace("vcdExtra", quietly = TRUE)) {
    df <- data.frame(x = x, y = y, g = group)
    V_pool <- try({
      vv <- by(df, df$g, function(s) {
        tab <- table(s$x, s$y)
        if (all(dim(tab) > 1)) {
          n <- sum(tab)
          r <- nrow(tab); c <- ncol(tab)
          chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
          sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r, c) - 1)))
        } else NA_real_
      })
      mean(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(vv)), na.rm = TRUE)
    }, silent = TRUE)
    V_pool <- if (inherits(V_pool, "try-error") || is.na(V_pool)) 0 else V_pool

    tab3 <- xtabs(~ x + y + g, data = df)
    cmh  <- try(vcdExtra::CMHtest(tab3), silent = TRUE)
    pval <- if (!inherits(cmh, "try-error")) cmh["All.Two_sided"]$p.value else NA_real_
    return(list(stat = V_pool, p = pval))
  }

  cramer_v(x, y)
}

# polyserial/polychoric on residuals (approx)
poly_serial_safe <- function(x_resid, ord) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(polycor::polyserial(x_resid, as.ordered(ord)), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error")) return(list(stat = as.numeric(out), p = NA_real_))
  }
  z  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ord))
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x_resid, z))
  list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value))
}

poly_choric_safe <- function(x, y, group = NULL) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(polycor::polychor(as.ordered(x), as.ordered(y), ML = TRUE, std.err = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error") && !is.null(attr(out, "std.err"))) {
      rho <- as.numeric(out); se <- attr(out, "std.err")
      z   <- rho / se; p <- 2*pnorm(-abs(z))
      return(list(stat = rho, p = p))
    }
  }
  cmh_or_cramer(as.factor(x), as.factor(y), group)
}

association_mats <- function(df, vars = colnames(df), group = NULL) {
  d <- df[vars]
  if (!is.null(group)) {
    d$..grp <- group
    d <- d[!is.na(d$..grp), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  vars <- setdiff(colnames(d), "..grp")
  p <- length(vars)

  coef_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
  p_mat    <- matrix(NA_real_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
  type_mat <- matrix(NA_character_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))

  grp <- if (!is.null(group)) d$..grp else NULL

  for (i in seq_len(p)) {
    for (j in i:p) {
      xi <- d[[vars[i]]]; yj <- d[[vars[j]]]
      if (i == j) { coef_mat[i,i] <- 1; p_mat[i,i] <- 0; type_mat[i,i] <- "diag"; next }

      if (is.numeric(xi) && is.numeric(yj)) {
        xr <- resid_by_group(xi, grp); yr <- resid_by_group(yj, grp)
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(xr, yr, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "r"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_binary_factor(yj)) {
        xr <- resid_by_group(xi, grp); b  <- as.numeric(yj) - 1
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(xr, b, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "pb"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_binary_factor(xi)) {
        yr <- resid_by_group(yj, grp); b  <- as.numeric(xi) - 1
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(yr, b, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "pb"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_unordered(yj) && nlevels(yj) > 2) {
        res <- eta_with_p_group(num = xi, fac = yj, group = grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "eta"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_unordered(xi) && nlevels(xi) > 2) {
        res <- eta_with_p_group(num = yj, fac = xi, group = grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "eta"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_ordinal(yj)) {
        xr  <- resid_by_group(xi, grp)
        res <- poly_serial_safe(xr, yj); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polyserial"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_ordinal(xi)) {
        yr  <- resid_by_group(yj, grp)
        res <- poly_serial_safe(yr, xi); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polyserial"

      } else if (is_ordinal(xi) && is_ordinal(yj)) {
        res <- poly_choric_safe(xi, yj, grp); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polychoric"

      } else {
        res <- cmh_or_cramer(as.factor(xi), as.factor(yj), grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "V_or_MH"
      }

      coef_mat[i,j] <- coef_mat[j,i] <- as.numeric(coef)
      p_mat[i,j]    <- p_mat[j,i]    <- as.numeric(pv)
      type_mat[i,j] <- type_mat[j,i] <- tp
    }
  }
  list(coef = coef_mat, p = p_mat, type = type_mat)
}

plot_assoc_matrix <- function(coef_mat, p_mat, type_mat = NULL,
                              order = "hclust",
                              y_shift = -0.20,
                              legend_inset = -0.15,
                              number_cex = 0.8, star_cex = 0.85,
                              tl_srt = 45, tl_col = "black",
                              diag = FALSE,
                              cl.pos = "r",
                              mark_unsigned = TRUE,
                              unsigned_marker = c("dot","triangle"),
                              unsigned_cex = 0.55,
                              show_type_symbols = FALSE) {
  unsigned_marker <- match.arg(unsigned_marker)
  stopifnot(identical(dimnames(coef_mat), dimnames(p_mat)))
  if (!is.null(type_mat)) stopifnot(identical(dimnames(type_mat), dimnames(coef_mat)))

  ## --- NA-safe ordering ---
  if (order == "original") {
    ord <- seq_len(ncol(coef_mat))
  } else {
    A_for_order <- as.matrix(coef_mat)
    diag(A_for_order) <- 1
    A_for_order[!is.finite(A_for_order)] <- 0
    ord <- corrplot::corrMatOrder(A_for_order, order = order)
  }

  A   <- coef_mat[ord, ord, drop = FALSE]
  P   <- p_mat[ord, ord, drop = FALSE]
  TYP <- if (is.null(type_mat)) NULL else type_mat[ord, ord, drop = FALSE]
  n   <- ncol(A)

  # palette/limits + label
  signed <- any(A < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  clim   <- if (signed) c(-1, 1) else c(0, 1)
  palette <- if (signed) {
    colorRampPalette(c("#b2182b", "white", "#2166ac"))(200)
  } else {
    colorRampPalette(c("white", "#b2182b"))(200)
  }

  if (!is.null(TYP)) {
    signed_types   <- c("r","pb","polyserial","polychoric")
    unsigned_types <- c("eta","V_or_MH")
    present <- unique(as.vector(TYP)); present <- setdiff(present, c(NA,"diag"))
    if (length(present) == 0) {
      cl_label <- "Correlation/Association"
    } else if (all(present %in% signed_types)) {
      cl_label <- "Correlation (r/\u03C1)"
    } else if (all(present %in% unsigned_types)) {
      cl_label <- "Association strength (\u03B7, V, MH)"
    } else {
      cl_label <- "Correlation/Association (r, \u03B7, V, MH)"
    }
  } else {
    cl_label <- if (signed) "Correlation (r/\u03C1)" else "Association strength (\u03B7, V, MH)"
  }

  op <- par(mar = c(4, 0, 2, 3)); on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)
  par(xpd = TRUE)

  # 1) main draw   (NA labeled "NA" instead of "?")
  corrplot::corrplot(
    A,
    type = "upper",
    order = "original",
    tl.col = tl_col,
    tl.srt = tl_srt,
    addCoef.col = "black",
    number.cex = number_cex,
    diag = diag,
    col = palette,
    cl.lim = clim,
    cl.pos = cl.pos,
    na.label = "NA"
  )

  # 1b) re-enter tile grid so overlays align
  corrplot::corrplot(
    A,
    type = "upper",
    order = "original",
    tl.pos = "n",
    cl.pos = "n",
    add = TRUE,
    col = palette,
    addCoef.col = NA,
    diag = diag,
    na.label = "NA"
  )

  # 2) significance stars
  stars <- ifelse(P < 0.001, "***",
           ifelse(P < 0.01,  "**",
           ifelse(P < 0.05,  "*",  "ns")))
  for (i in 1:n) for (j in 1:n) if (i < j && !is.na(P[i,j])) {
    text(x = j, y = n - i + 1 + y_shift, labels = stars[i, j],
         cex = star_cex, col = "black")
  }

  # 3) mark unsigned measures (η / V / MH) with dot/triangle
  if (mark_unsigned && !is.null(TYP)) {
    U <- matrix(TYP %in% c("eta","V_or_MH"), nrow = nrow(TYP), ncol = ncol(TYP))
    for (i in 1:n) for (j in 1:n) if (i < j && isTRUE(U[i, j])) {
      x <- j - 0.37; y <- (n - i + 1) + 0.37
      if (unsigned_marker == "dot") {
        points(x, y, pch = 16, cex = unsigned_cex)
      } else {
        polygon(x + c(-0.06, 0.06, -0.06),
                y + c(0.06, 0.06, -0.06),
                border = NA, col = "black")
      }
    }
  }

  # 3b) OPTIONAL: overlay type symbols (η / V) in cells for unsigned stats
  if (show_type_symbols && !is.null(TYP)) {
    for (i in 1:n) {
      for (j in 1:n) {
        if (i < j && !is.na(TYP[i, j]) && TYP[i, j] %in% c("eta","V_or_MH")) {
          sym <- if (TYP[i, j] == "eta") "η" else "V"
          # upper-left-ish corner of the cell
          text(
            x = j - 0.4,
            y = (n - i + 1) + 0.4,
            labels = sym,
            cex = 0.8,
            font = 2
          )
        }
      }
    }
  }

  # 4) significance legend
  legend(
    "bottom",
    inset = legend_inset,
    horiz = TRUE,
    legend = c(
      expression("***" ~ italic(P) < 0.001),
      expression("**" ~ italic(P) < 0.01),
      expression("*" ~ italic(P) < 0.05),
      expression(phantom() ^ "ns" ~ italic(P) >= 0.05)
    ),
    bty = "n",
    text.col = "black",
    cex = 0.9,
    x.intersp = 0.8
  )

  # 5) note for unsigned markers or symbols
  if (!is.null(TYP)) {
    usr <- par("usr")
    y_note <- usr[3] - diff(usr[3:4]) * 0.12
    x_note <- mean(usr[1:2])

    if (show_type_symbols) {
      text(
        x_note, y_note,
        labels = "η / V labels mark unsigned measures (\u03B7, V, MH)",
        cex = 0.8
      )
    } else if (mark_unsigned) {
      text(
        x_note, y_note,
        labels = "\u2022 marks unsigned measures (\u03B7, V, MH)",
        cex = 0.8
      )
    }
  }

  # 6) colorbar label
  if (cl.pos == "r") {
    mtext(cl_label, side = 4, line = 1.2, cex = 0.9)
  } else if (cl.pos == "b") {
    mtext(cl_label, side = 1, line = 2.2, cex = 0.9)
  }

  invisible(list(order = ord, signed = signed, cl_label = cl_label))
}

## ---------- variable lists ----------
# soil pH column (if present)
soil_var <- if ("soil_pH" %in% names(df_nona)) {
  "soil_pH"
} else if ("soil_p_h" %in% names(df_nona)) {
  "soil_p_h"
} else {
  NULL
}

# core covariates + product (seed treatment)
core_vars <- c(
  "yield_mtha",
  "sds_tol",
  "mean_fv_ratio",
  "scn_count_rep",
  "fdx",
  "product"
)

avail_vars <- intersect(core_vars, names(df_nona))

## ---------- UI ----------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Mixed-type Correlation Explorer (by Year & Seed Treatment)"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4("Subset selection"),
      checkboxGroupInput(
        "year_sel",
        "Select year(s):",
        choices  = sort(unique(df_nona$year)),
        selected = sort(unique(df_nona$year))
      ),
      checkboxGroupInput(
        "product_sel",
        "Select seed treatment(s):",
        choices  = sort(unique(df_nona$product)),
        selected = sort(unique(df_nona$product))
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("Variables in matrix"),
      checkboxGroupInput(
        "vars_sel",
        "Core variables to include:",
        choices  = avail_vars,
        selected = avail_vars
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        "include_soil_ph",
        label = "Include soil pH in matrix",
        value = FALSE
      ),

      checkboxInput(
        "use_SiteYear_group",
        "Use SiteYear as stratification group (for CMH / residualization)",
        value = TRUE
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("Plot options"),
      selectInput(
        "order_method",
        "Matrix ordering:",
        choices = c(
          "Hierarchical clustering" = "hclust",
          "Original order"          = "original"
        ),
        selected = "hclust"
      ),
      selectInput(
        "unsigned_marker",
        "Marker for unsigned stats (\u03B7 / V / MH):",
        choices = c("Dot" = "dot", "Triangle" = "triangle"),
        selected = "dot"
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        "show_type_symbols",
        "Show η / V symbols in unsigned cells",
        value = FALSE
      ),
      sliderInput("number_cex", "Coefficient label size:",
                  min = 0.5, max = 1.5, value = 0.8, step = 0.05),
      sliderInput("star_cex", "Significance star size:",
                  min = 0.5, max = 1.5, value = 0.85, step = 0.05),

      hr(),
      h4("Export correlation object"),
      textInput(
        "corr_obj_name",
        "Object name (Environment):",
        value = "corr_explorer_object"
      ),
      actionButton(
        "save_corr_to_env",
        "💾 Save matrices + settings to Environment"
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("Download figure"),
      textInput(
        "corr_png_basename",
        "Base filename (no extension):",
        value = "corr_matrix"
      ),
      numericInput(
        "corr_png_width",
        "Width (px):",
        value = 2400,
        min   = 500,
        step  = 100
      ),
      numericInput(
        "corr_png_height",
        "Height (px):",
        value = 2400,
        min   = 500,
        step  = 100
      ),
      numericInput(
        "corr_png_res",
        "Resolution (dpi):",
        value = 300,
        min   = 72,
        step  = 10
      ),
      downloadButton(
        "download_corr_png",
        label = "⬇️ Download correlation PNG"
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("corrPlot", height = "650px")
    )
  )
)

## ---------- SERVER ----------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # row indices for selected year(s) + product(s)
  selected_idx <- reactive({
    idx <- seq_len(nrow(df_nona))

    yrs <- input$year_sel
    if (!is.null(yrs) && length(yrs)) {
      idx <- idx[df_nona$year[idx] %in% yrs]
    }

    prods <- input$product_sel
    if (!is.null(prods) && length(prods)) {
      idx <- idx[df_nona$product[idx] %in% prods]
    }

    idx
  })

  sub_df <- reactive({
    df_nona[selected_idx(), , drop = FALSE]
  })

  vars_current <- reactive({
    df_sub <- sub_df()
    v <- input$vars_sel
    v <- intersect(v, names(df_sub))

    # optionally add soil pH
    if (isTRUE(input$include_soil_ph) &&
        !is.null(soil_var) &&
        soil_var %in% names(df_sub)) {
      v <- union(v, soil_var)
    }

    validate(
      need(length(v) > 1, "Select at least two variables for the correlation matrix.")
    )
    v
  })

  mats_reactive <- reactive({
    df_sub <- sub_df()
    vars   <- vars_current()
    grp    <- if (isTRUE(input$use_SiteYear_group) && "SiteYear" %in% names(df_sub)) {
      df_sub$SiteYear
    } else {
      NULL
    }

    association_mats(
      df   = df_sub,
      vars = vars,
      group = grp
    )
  })

  output$corrPlot <- renderPlot({
    mats <- mats_reactive()

    plot_assoc_matrix(
      coef_mat        = mats$coef,
      p_mat           = mats$p,
      type_mat        = mats$type,
      order           = input$order_method,
      number_cex      = input$number_cex,
      star_cex        = input$star_cex,
      unsigned_marker = input$unsigned_marker,
      mark_unsigned   = !input$show_type_symbols,  # turn off dot/triangle when showing symbols
      show_type_symbols = input$show_type_symbols
    )
  })

  observeEvent(input$save_corr_to_env, {
    mats   <- mats_reactive()
    df_sub <- sub_df()

    obj <- list(
      coef_mat   = mats$coef,
      p_mat      = mats$p,
      type_mat   = mats$type,
      vars       = vars_current(),
      years      = unique(df_sub$year),
      products   = unique(df_sub$product),
      used_group = if (isTRUE(input$use_SiteYear_group)) "SiteYear" else NULL,
      timestamp  = Sys.time()
    )

    obj_name <- input$corr_obj_name
    if (is.null(obj_name) || !nzchar(obj_name)) {
      obj_name <- "corr_explorer_object"
    }

    assign(obj_name, obj, envir = .GlobalEnv)

    showNotification(
      paste("Saved correlation object as:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  ## ---- Download PNG of the *exact* GUI figure ----
  output$download_corr_png <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      base <- input$corr_png_basename
      if (is.null(base) || !nzchar(base)) base <- "corr_matrix"
      paste0(base, ".png")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      mats <- mats_reactive()

      png(
        filename = file,
        width    = input$corr_png_width,
        height   = input$corr_png_height,
        res      = input$corr_png_res
      )

      plot_assoc_matrix(
        coef_mat        = mats$coef,
        p_mat           = mats$p,
        type_mat        = mats$type,
        order           = input$order_method,
        number_cex      = input$number_cex,
        star_cex        = input$star_cex,
        unsigned_marker = input$unsigned_marker,
        mark_unsigned   = !input$show_type_symbols,
        show_type_symbols = input$show_type_symbols
      )

      dev.off()
    }
  )
}

## ---------- RUN APP ----------
shinyApp(ui, server)

```

```{r}
# Removed 1 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.

  #draw_label("Figure Title Here",size=32,fontface="bold") #sets up a function-call with the title
```
