### PATHWAY ANALYSIS GUI ###
```{r}
# Removed 10 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.
## ---------- libraries ----------

## IMPORTANT: in your session you must have:
## df_nona = full analysis dataset (includes year, location, SiteYear, soil_pH or soil_p_h, etc.)

base_df <- df_nona

## ---------- safe year/location levels (from df_nona if present) ----------
year_levels <- if ("year" %in% names(base_df)) {
  sort(unique(base_df$year))
} else {
  NULL
}

loc_levels <- if ("location" %in% names(base_df)) {
  sort(unique(base_df$location))
} else {
  NULL
}

## ---------- choose soil pH variable name robustly ----------
soil_var_name <- if ("soil_pH" %in% names(base_df)) {
  "soil_pH"
} else if ("soil_p_h" %in% names(base_df)) {
  "soil_p_h"
} else {
  # fallback name used in templates; will error clearly if not present
  "soil_pH"
}

## ---------- style presets (same as PCA GUI) ----------
apply_style_preset <- function(p, preset = "Default") {
  base <- theme(
    text = element_text(family = "", colour = "black"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

  if (preset == "Plant Disease") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Phytopathology") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Crop Protection") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else if (preset == "Nature-style") {
    p + base +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "plain"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "plain"),
        legend.text  = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  } else {
    p + theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )
  }
}

## ---------- association helpers (COPIED FROM CORR GUI) ----------
is_binary_factor <- function(x) is.factor(x) && nlevels(x) == 2
is_ordinal       <- function(x) is.ordered(x) && nlevels(x) == 10
is_unordered     <- function(x) is.factor(x) && !is_ordinal(x)

# residualize numeric by group
resid_by_group <- function(x, group) {
  if (!is.numeric(x)) return(x)
  if (is.null(group)) return(x)
  # keep length(x) by reinserting NA residuals in dropped rows
  resid(lm(x ~ group, na.action = na.exclude))
}

# eta with OPTIONAL group (FIXED)
eta_with_p_group <- function(num, fac, group = NULL) {
  fac <- droplevels(fac)

  # base mask: y and g not NA
  ok <- !is.na(num) & !is.na(fac)
  if (!is.null(group)) {
    ok <- ok & !is.na(group)
  }

  num   <- num[ok]
  fac   <- fac[ok]
  group <- if (!is.null(group)) group[ok] else NULL

  # not enough data? bail out
  if (length(num) < 2 || nlevels(fac) < 2) {
    return(list(stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
  }

  if (is.null(group)) {
    # No stratification: standard one-way ANOVA
    dd  <- data.frame(y = num, g = fac)
    fit <- aov(y ~ g, data = dd)
  } else {
    # With group / blocking factor
    dd  <- data.frame(y = num, g = fac, grp = group)
    fit <- aov(y ~ g + grp, data = dd)
  }

  tb <- summary(fit)[[1]]

  SS_g  <- tb["g","Sum Sq"]
  SS_e  <- tb["Residuals","Sum Sq"]
  eta2p <- SS_g / (SS_g + SS_e)
  pval  <- tb["g","Pr(>F)"]

  list(stat = sqrt(max(0, eta2p)), p = pval)
}

# Cramér's V
cramer_v <- function(x, y) {
  tab <- table(x, y)
  chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
  n   <- sum(tab)
  r   <- nrow(tab); c <- ncol(tab)
  V   <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r, c) - 1)))
  list(stat = V, p = chi$p.value)
}

cmh_or_cramer <- function(x, y, group) {
  if (is.null(group)) return(cramer_v(x, y))

  # binary-binary: Mantel–Haenszel
  if (is_binary_factor(x) && is_binary_factor(y)) {
    arr <- table(group, x, y)     # 3-way table: strata x 2 x 2
    if (length(dim(arr)) == 3 &&
        dim(arr)[2] == 2 && dim(arr)[3] == 2) {
      cmh <- suppressWarnings(mantelhaen.test(arr))
      or  <- as.numeric(cmh$estimate)
      fx  <- if (is.finite(or) && or > 0) abs(log(or)) else 0
      stat <- fx / (1 + fx)
      return(list(stat = stat, p = cmh$p.value))
    }
  }

  # generalized CMH if available
  if (requireNamespace("vcd", quietly = TRUE) &&
      requireNamespace("vcdExtra", quietly = TRUE)) {
    df <- data.frame(x = x, y = y, g = group)
    V_pool <- try({
      vv <- by(df, df$g, function(s) {
        tab <- table(s$x, s$y)
        if (all(dim(tab) > 1)) {
          n <- sum(tab)
          r <- nrow(tab); c <- ncol(tab)
          chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
          sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r, c) - 1)))
        } else NA_real_
      })
      mean(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(vv)), na.rm = TRUE)
    }, silent = TRUE)
    V_pool <- if (inherits(V_pool, "try-error") || is.na(V_pool)) 0 else V_pool

    tab3 <- xtabs(~ x + y + g, data = df)
    cmh  <- try(vcdExtra::CMHtest(tab3), silent = TRUE)
    pval <- if (!inherits(cmh, "try-error")) cmh["All.Two_sided"]$p.value else NA_real_
    return(list(stat = V_pool, p = pval))
  }

  cramer_v(x, y)
}

# polyserial/polychoric on residuals (approx)
poly_serial_safe <- function(x_resid, ord) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(polycor::polyserial(x_resid, as.ordered(ord)), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error")) return(list(stat = as.numeric(out), p = NA_real_))
  }
  z  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ord))
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x_resid, z))
  list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value))
}

poly_choric_safe <- function(x, y, group = NULL) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(polycor::polychor(as.ordered(x), as.ordered(y), ML = TRUE, std.err = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error") && !is.null(attr(out, "std.err"))) {
      rho <- as.numeric(out); se <- attr(out, "std.err")
      z   <- rho / se; p <- 2*pnorm(-abs(z))
      return(list(stat = rho, p = p))
    }
  }
  cmh_or_cramer(as.factor(x), as.factor(y), group)
}

association_mats <- function(df, vars = colnames(df), group = NULL) {
  d <- df[vars]
  if (!is.null(group)) {
    d$..grp <- group
    d <- d[!is.na(d$..grp), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  vars <- setdiff(colnames(d), "..grp")
  p <- length(vars)

  coef_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
  p_mat    <- matrix(NA_real_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
  type_mat <- matrix(NA_character_, p, p, dimnames = list(vars, vars))

  grp <- if (!is.null(group)) d$..grp else NULL

  for (i in seq_len(p)) {
    for (j in i:p) {
      xi <- d[[vars[i]]]; yj <- d[[vars[j]]]
      if (i == j) { coef_mat[i,i] <- 1; p_mat[i,i] <- 0; type_mat[i,i] <- "diag"; next }

      if (is.numeric(xi) && is.numeric(yj)) {
        xr <- resid_by_group(xi, grp); yr <- resid_by_group(yj, grp)
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(xr, yr, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "r"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_binary_factor(yj)) {
        xr <- resid_by_group(xi, grp); b  <- as.numeric(yj) - 1
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(xr, b, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "pb"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_binary_factor(xi)) {
        yr <- resid_by_group(yj, grp); b  <- as.numeric(xi) - 1
        ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(yr, b, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
        coef <- unname(ct$estimate); pv <- unname(ct$p.value); tp <- "pb"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_unordered(yj) && nlevels(yj) > 2) {
        res <- eta_with_p_group(num = xi, fac = yj, group = grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "eta"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_unordered(xi) && nlevels(xi) > 2) {
        res <- eta_with_p_group(num = yj, fac = xi, group = grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "eta"

      } else if (is.numeric(xi) && is_ordinal(yj)) {
        xr  <- resid_by_group(xi, grp)
        res <- poly_serial_safe(xr, yj); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polyserial"

      } else if (is.numeric(yj) && is_ordinal(xi)) {
        yr  <- resid_by_group(yj, grp)
        res <- poly_serial_safe(yr, xi); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polyserial"

      } else if (is_ordinal(xi) && is_ordinal(yj)) {
        res <- poly_choric_safe(xi, yj, grp); coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "polychoric"

      } else {
        res <- cmh_or_cramer(as.factor(xi), as.factor(yj), grp)
        coef <- res$stat; pv <- res$p; tp <- "V_or_MH"
      }

      coef_mat[i,j] <- coef_mat[j,i] <- as.numeric(coef)
      p_mat[i,j]    <- p_mat[j,i]    <- as.numeric(pv)
      type_mat[i,j] <- type_mat[j,i] <- tp
    }
  }
  list(coef = coef_mat, p = p_mat, type = type_mat)
}

## ---------- SEM templates (no sds_tol, soil var injected) ----------
sem_templates <- list(
  yield_sds = sprintf("
# Yield-centric SDS/FDX pathway model
# All variables must be numeric (or coercible to numeric) columns in df_nona

yield_mtha ~ b1*fdx + b2*mean_fv_ratio + b3*scn_count_rep + b4*%s
fdx        ~ c1*mean_fv_ratio + c2*scn_count_rep + c3*%s

# Indirect effects
ind_yield_via_fdx := c1*b1
", soil_var_name, soil_var_name),

  fdx_sds = sprintf("
# FDX-centric pathway model

fdx        ~ c1*mean_fv_ratio + c2*scn_count_rep + c3*%s
yield_mtha ~ b1*fdx + b2*mean_fv_ratio + b3*scn_count_rep + b4*%s

# Indirect effects
ind_yield_via_fdx := c1*b1
", soil_var_name, soil_var_name),

  blank = "# Write your lavaan model here, e.g.\n# y ~ x1 + x2\n# m ~ x1\n# y ~ m\n"
)

default_sem_model <- sem_templates$yield_sds

## ---------- SEM & Network variable choices (from df_nona) ----------
sem_var_candidates <- c(
  "yield_mtha",
  "fdx",
  "mean_fv_ratio",
  "scn_count_rep",
  soil_var_name
)

sem_var_choices <- intersect(sem_var_candidates, colnames(base_df))

network_var_candidates <- c(
  "yield_mtha",
  "sds_tol",        # still allowed in network if present
  "mean_fv_ratio",
  "scn_count_rep",
  "fdx",
  soil_var_name,
  "product"
)
network_var_choices <- intersect(network_var_candidates, colnames(base_df))

## optional grouping variable for residualization (e.g., SiteYear factor)
group_choices <- c("None", names(base_df)[!sapply(base_df, is.numeric)])

## ---------- stat-type legend map ----------
stat_legend_map <- c(
  r           = "r: Pearson (numeric–numeric)",
  pb          = "pb: point-biserial (numeric–binary)",
  eta         = "η: effect size (numeric–factor)",
  polyserial  = "polyserial: numeric–ordinal",
  polychoric  = "polychoric: ordinal–ordinal",
  V_or_MH     = "V/MH: Cramér's V / MH"
)

## ---------- helper: node aesthetics (shared GUI/PNG/export) ----------
build_node_aes <- function(g, layout_matrix, node_size_factor = 1, label_cex = 0.9) {
  var_names <- V(g)$name
  var_type  <- rep("Other", length(var_names))
  names(var_type) <- var_names

  var_type[intersect(names(var_type), c("yield_mtha"))]              <- "Yield"
  var_type[intersect(names(var_type), c("scn_count_rep"))]          <- "SCN"
  var_type[intersect(names(var_type), c("fdx", "mean_fv_ratio",
                                        "sds_tol"))]                <- "SDS"
  var_type[intersect(names(var_type), c(soil_var_name))]            <- "Soil pH"
  var_type[intersect(names(var_type), c("product"))]                <- "Treatment"

  type_cols <- c(
    "Yield"     = "#1b9e77",
    "SCN"       = "#ffd92f",
    "SDS"       = "#cd4c46",
    "Soil pH"   = "#f17925",
    "Treatment" = "#438fff",
    "Other"     = "grey80"
  )

  deg <- igraph::degree(g)
  base_size <- 10 + 6 * log1p(deg)
  node_size <- base_size * node_size_factor

  list(
    var_type  = var_type,
    type_cols = type_cols,
    size      = node_size,
    frame_col = "grey40",
    label_cex = label_cex
  )
}

## ---------- UI ----------
style_choices <- c(
  "Default",
  "Plant Disease",
  "Phytopathology",
  "Crop Protection",
  "Nature-style"
)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Pathway Analysis GUI: SEM + Network"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4("Filters"),
      if (!is.null(year_levels)) {
        checkboxGroupInput(
          inputId = "year_sel",
          label   = "Select year(s):",
          choices = year_levels,
          selected = year_levels
        )
      } else {
        helpText("No 'year' column in df_nona; year filter disabled.")
      },
      if (!is.null(loc_levels)) {
        checkboxGroupInput(
          inputId = "loc_sel",
          label   = "Select location(s):",
          choices = loc_levels,
          selected = loc_levels
        )
      } else {
        helpText("No 'location' column in df_nona; location filter disabled.")
      },

      selectInput(
        "style_preset", "Style preset for ggplot outputs:",
        choices = style_choices,
        selected = "Plant Disease"
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("SEM / Path model"),
      selectInput(
        inputId = "sem_template",
        label   = "Model template:",
        choices = c(
          "Yield-centric SDS/FDX model" = "yield_sds",
          "FDX-centric model"           = "fdx_sds",
          "Blank (custom)"              = "blank"
        ),
        selected = "yield_sds"
      ),
      actionButton("load_sem_template", "Load template into editor"),
      br(), br(),
      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "sem_vars",
        label   = "Variables available for SEM (will be coerced to numeric if needed):",
        choices = sem_var_choices,
        selected = sem_var_choices
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        inputId = "sem_standardized",
        label   = "Show standardized estimates in summary",
        value   = TRUE
      ),
      textAreaInput(
        inputId = "sem_model",
        label   = "lavaan model syntax:",
        value   = default_sem_model,
        rows    = 14
      ),
      actionButton("fit_sem", "Fit SEM model"),

      hr(),
      h4("Network graph (association-based)"),
      selectInput(
        inputId = "group_var",
        label   = "Grouping variable for residualization (e.g., SiteYear):",
        choices = group_choices,
        selected = "None"
      ),
      checkboxGroupInput(
        inputId = "network_vars",
        label   = "Variables to include in network:",
        choices = network_var_choices,
        selected = network_var_choices
      ),
      sliderInput(
        inputId = "network_min_edge",
        label   = "Min |effect size| for edge:",
        min     = 0, max = 1, value = 0.3, step = 0.05
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        inputId = "network_use_p",
        label   = "Filter edges by p-value",
        value   = FALSE
      ),
      numericInput(
        inputId = "network_alpha",
        label   = "Max p-value (if filtering):",
        value   = 0.05,
        min     = 0.0001,
        max     = 1,
        step    = 0.01
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        inputId = "network_show_labels",
        label   = "Show edge labels (value + stat type)",
        value   = FALSE
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("Network aesthetics (GUI & PNG)"),
      sliderInput(
        "node_size_factor",
        "Node size factor:",
        min = 0.5, max = 2, value = 1, step = 0.1
      ),
      sliderInput(
        "label_cex",
        "Label size:",
        min = 0.5, max = 1.5, value = 0.9, step = 0.05
      ),
      sliderInput(
        "layout_scale",
        "Layout expansion:",
        min = 0.5, max = 2, value = 1, step = 0.1
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        "show_edge_stat_legend",
        "Show edge stat-type legend",
        value = TRUE
      ),
      checkboxInput(
        "show_node_type_legend",
        "Show node-type legend",
        value = TRUE
      ),

      hr(),
      h4("Export network to Environment"),
      textInput(
        "export_obj_name",
        "Export object name:",
        value = "pathway_network_object"
      ),
      actionButton(
        "export_network_to_env",
        "💾 Save network graph/layout to Environment"
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel(
          "SEM / Path model",
          h4("Path diagram"),
          plotOutput("sem_path_plot", height = "500px"),
          hr(),
          h4("Model sanity check (SEM variables in syntax vs data)"),
          verbatimTextOutput("sem_model_check"),
          hr(),
          h4("Fit indices"),
          tableOutput("sem_fit_indices"),
          hr(),
          h4("Detailed summary"),
          verbatimTextOutput("sem_summary")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Network graph",
          h4("Correlation-based network"),
          plotOutput("network_plot", height = "600px"),
          hr(),
          h4("Edge list (filtered)"),
          tableOutput("network_edges"),
          hr(),
          downloadButton(
            outputId = "download_network_png",
            label    = "⬇️ Download network PNG"
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

## ---------- SERVER ----------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  ## ---- filtered base data (year/location on df_nona) ----
  filtered_df <- reactive({
    df <- base_df

    if ("year" %in% colnames(df) &&
        !is.null(input$year_sel) && length(input$year_sel) > 0) {
      df <- df[df$year %in% input$year_sel, , drop = FALSE]
    }
    if ("location" %in% colnames(df) &&
        !is.null(input$loc_sel) && length(input$loc_sel) > 0) {
      df <- df[df$location %in% input$loc_sel, , drop = FALSE]
    }

    df
  })

  ## ---- SEM template loader ----
  observeEvent(input$load_sem_template, {
    template_id <- input$sem_template
    model_text  <- sem_templates[[template_id]]
    if (is.null(model_text)) model_text <- ""
    updateTextAreaInput(session, "sem_model", value = model_text)
  })

  ## ---- SEM data (coerce selected vars to numeric) ----
  sem_data <- reactive({
    df <- filtered_df()
    vars <- intersect(input$sem_vars, colnames(df))
    validate(
      need(length(vars) >= 2,
           "Select at least two variables for SEM.")
    )

    dat <- df[, vars, drop = FALSE]

    # Coerce non-numeric columns to numeric if possible
    for (v in vars) {
      if (!is.numeric(dat[[v]])) {
        suppressWarnings({
          num_vals <- as.numeric(as.character(dat[[v]]))
        })
        if (all(is.na(num_vals))) {
          num_vals <- as.numeric(dat[[v]])
        }
        dat[[v]] <- num_vals
      }
    }

    valid_cols <- vars[!sapply(dat, function(x) all(is.na(x)))]
    validate(
      need(length(valid_cols) >= 2,
           "After numeric coercion, fewer than two SEM variables have usable data.")
    )

    dat[, valid_cols, drop = FALSE]
  })

  sem_fit <- reactiveVal(NULL)

  ## ---- Fit SEM model ----
  observeEvent(input$fit_sem, {
    dat <- sem_data()
    model_text <- input$sem_model

    if (nchar(trimws(model_text)) == 0) {
      showNotification("Provide a lavaan SEM model in the text area.", type = "error")
      return()
    }

    # variables referenced in the template set
    referenced_vars <- sem_var_candidates[
      vapply(sem_var_candidates, function(v) {
        grepl(paste0("\\b", v, "\\b"), model_text)
      }, logical(1))
    ]

    missing_in_dat <- setdiff(referenced_vars, colnames(dat))
    if (length(missing_in_dat) > 0) {
      showNotification(
        paste(
          "SEM fitting failed: the following variables appear in the model but are not in the selected SEM data:",
          paste(missing_in_dat, collapse = ", ")
        ),
        type     = "error",
        duration = NULL
      )
      return()
    }

    fit_try <- try(
      lavaan::sem(
        model   = model_text,
        data    = dat,
        missing = "fiml",
        std.lv  = TRUE
      ),
      silent = TRUE
    )

    if (inherits(fit_try, "try-error")) {
      msg <- paste(fit_try, collapse = " ")
      showNotification(
        paste0("SEM fitting failed: ", msg),
        type     = "error",
        duration = NULL
      )
      return()
    }

    sem_fit(fit_try)
    showNotification("SEM model fitted successfully.", type = "message")
  })

  ## ---- SEM model sanity check output ----
  output$sem_model_check <- renderText({
    model_text <- input$sem_model
    if (is.null(model_text) || nchar(trimws(model_text)) == 0) {
      return("No model specified yet.")
    }

    dat <- try(sem_data(), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(dat, "try-error")) {
      return("SEM data not available yet (check filters and SEM variable selection).")
    }

    referenced_vars <- sem_var_candidates[
      vapply(sem_var_candidates, function(v) {
        grepl(paste0("\\b", v, "\\b"), model_text)
      }, logical(1))
    ]

    if (length(referenced_vars) == 0) {
      return("No recognized SEM variables (from predefined candidates) found in model syntax.")
    }

    present <- intersect(referenced_vars, colnames(dat))
    missing <- setdiff(referenced_vars, colnames(dat))

    paste0(
      "Variables referenced in model: ",
      paste(referenced_vars, collapse = ", "),
      "\nPresent in SEM data: ",
      ifelse(length(present) > 0, paste(present, collapse = ", "), "none"),
      "\nMissing from SEM data: ",
      ifelse(length(missing) > 0, paste(missing, collapse = ", "), "none")
    )
  })

  ## ---- SEM outputs ----
  output$sem_summary <- renderPrint({
    fit <- sem_fit()
    req(fit)

    lavaan::summary(
      fit,
      fit.measures = TRUE,
      standardized = isTRUE(input$sem_standardized),
      rsquare      = TRUE
    )
  })

  output$sem_fit_indices <- renderTable({
    fit <- sem_fit()
    req(fit)

    fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(
      fit,
      c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr")
    )

    data.frame(
      Measure = names(fm),
      Value   = as.numeric(fm),
      row.names = NULL
    )
  })

  output$sem_path_plot <- renderPlot({
    fit <- sem_fit()
    req(fit)

    semPlot::semPaths(
      fit,
      what           = "std",
      whatLabels     = "std",
      style          = "lisrel",
      layout         = "spring",
      edge.label.cex = 0.9,
      nCharNodes     = 0,
      residuals      = TRUE,
      intercepts     = FALSE,
      mar            = c(4, 4, 4, 4)
    )
  })

  ## ---- Network: association matrix ----
  network_mats <- reactive({
    df <- filtered_df()
    validate(
      need(nrow(df) > 2,
           "Not enough observations after filtering for network.")
    )

    vars <- intersect(input$network_vars, colnames(df))
    validate(
      need(length(vars) >= 2,
           "Select at least two variables for the network.")
    )

    grp <- NULL
    if (!is.null(input$group_var) && input$group_var != "None" &&
        input$group_var %in% colnames(df)) {
      grp <- df[[input$group_var]]
    }

    association_mats(df, vars = vars, group = grp)
  })

  network_edges_df <- reactive({
    mats <- network_mats()
    coef <- mats$coef
    pmat <- mats$p
    tmat <- mats$type

    vars <- colnames(coef)
    idx  <- which(upper.tri(coef), arr.ind = TRUE)

    edges <- tibble::tibble(
      from   = vars[idx[, "row"]],
      to     = vars[idx[, "col"]],
      weight = as.numeric(coef[idx]),
      p      = as.numeric(pmat[idx]),
      type   = tmat[idx]
    ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(weight))

    edges <- edges %>%
      filter(abs(weight) >= input$network_min_edge)

    if (isTRUE(input$network_use_p)) {
      edges <- edges %>%
        filter(!is.na(p), p <= input$network_alpha)
    }

    validate(
      need(nrow(edges) > 0,
           "No edges meet the filtering criteria. Try lowering the effect size threshold or relaxing p-value filter.")
    )

    edges
  })

  network_graph <- reactive({
    edges <- network_edges_df()
    vars  <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))

    g <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(
      d = edges,
      directed = FALSE,
      vertices = data.frame(name = vars)
    )

    # layout weights must be positive for Fruchterman-Reingold
    E(g)$w_layout <- pmax(1e-6, abs(E(g)$weight))

    g
  })

  ## ---- Network plot with legends ----
  output$network_plot <- renderPlot({
    g <- network_graph()

    set.seed(123)
    lay <- igraph::layout_with_fr(g, weights = E(g)$w_layout)
    lay <- lay * input$layout_scale

    ew <- E(g)$weight

    # Edge aesthetics
    E(g)$color <- ifelse(ew >= 0, "#b2182b", "#2166ac")
    E(g)$width <- 1 + 4 * pmin(1, abs(ew))

    # Optional edge labels
    if (isTRUE(input$network_show_labels)) {
      etype <- E(g)$type
      E(g)$label <- paste0(round(ew, 2), " (", etype, ")")
    } else {
      E(g)$label <- NA
    }

    # Node aesthetics with type-based coloring
    node_aes <- build_node_aes(
      g,
      layout_matrix    = lay,
      node_size_factor = input$node_size_factor,
      label_cex        = input$label_cex
    )

    V(g)$color        <- node_aes$type_cols[node_aes$var_type]
    V(g)$frame.color  <- node_aes$frame_col
    V(g)$label.cex    <- node_aes$label_cex
    V(g)$size         <- node_aes$size

    # Draw graph
    plot(
      g,
      layout             = lay,
      vertex.label.color = "black",
      edge.label         = E(g)$label
    )

    ## ----- Edge stat-type legend -----
    if (isTRUE(input$show_edge_stat_legend)) {
      types_present <- sort(unique(E(g)$type))
      types_present <- types_present[!is.na(types_present)]

      if (length(types_present) > 0) {
        legend_labels <- stat_legend_map[types_present]
        legend_labels <- legend_labels[!is.na(legend_labels)]

        if (length(legend_labels) > 0) {
          legend(
            "topleft",
            legend = legend_labels,
            bty    = "n",
            cex    = 0.7,
            title  = "Edge stat type"
          )
        }
      }
    }

    ## ----- Node color legend -----
    if (isTRUE(input$show_node_type_legend)) {
      node_types_present <- sort(unique(node_aes$var_type))
      node_types_present <- node_types_present[!is.na(node_types_present)]

      if (length(node_types_present) > 0) {
        legend(
          "bottomleft",
          legend = node_types_present,
          pch    = 16,
          col    = node_aes$type_cols[node_types_present],
          bty    = "n",
          cex    = 0.7,
          title  = "Node type"
        )
      }
    }
  })

  output$network_edges <- renderTable({
    network_edges_df() %>%
      mutate(
        weight = round(weight, 3),
        p      = round(p, 4)
      )
  })

  ## ---- Export network object to Environment ----
  observeEvent(input$export_network_to_env, {
    g <- network_graph()

    set.seed(123)
    lay <- igraph::layout_with_fr(g, weights = E(g)$w_layout)
    lay <- lay * input$layout_scale

    node_aes <- build_node_aes(
      g,
      layout_matrix    = lay,
      node_size_factor = input$node_size_factor,
      label_cex        = input$label_cex
    )

    edges_df <- as.data.frame(network_edges_df())

    nodes_df <- data.frame(
      name   = V(g)$name,
      x      = lay[, 1],
      y      = lay[, 2],
      type   = unname(node_aes$var_type),
      size   = node_aes$size,
      color  = unname(node_aes$type_cols[node_aes$var_type]),
      degree = igraph::degree(g),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    obj <- list(
      graph    = g,
      layout   = lay,
      nodes    = nodes_df,
      edges    = edges_df,
      settings = list(
        style_preset           = input$style_preset,
        group_var              = input$group_var,
        network_min_edge       = input$network_min_edge,
        network_use_p          = input$network_use_p,
        network_alpha          = input$network_alpha,
        network_show_labels    = input$network_show_labels,
        node_size_factor       = input$node_size_factor,
        label_cex              = input$label_cex,
        layout_scale           = input$layout_scale,
        show_edge_stat_legend  = input$show_edge_stat_legend,
        show_node_type_legend  = input$show_node_type_legend
      )
    )

    obj_name <- input$export_obj_name
    if (is.null(obj_name) || !nzchar(obj_name)) {
      obj_name <- "pathway_network_object"
    }

    assign(obj_name, obj, envir = .GlobalEnv)

    showNotification(
      paste("Saved network object as:", obj_name),
      type = "message"
    )
  })

  ## ---- Download network PNG ----
  output$download_network_png <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      paste0("Pathway_network_", Sys.Date(), ".png")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      g <- network_graph()
      set.seed(123)
      lay <- igraph::layout_with_fr(g, weights = E(g)$w_layout)
      lay <- lay * input$layout_scale

      ew <- E(g)$weight

      # Edge aesthetics
      E(g)$color <- ifelse(ew >= 0, "#b2182b", "#2166ac")
      E(g)$width <- 1 + 4 * pmin(1, abs(ew))

      # Edge labels for export if enabled in app
      if (isTRUE(input$network_show_labels)) {
        etype <- E(g)$type
        E(g)$label <- paste0(round(ew, 2), " (", etype, ")")
      } else {
        E(g)$label <- NA
      }

      # Node aesthetics for export (same as plot)
      node_aes <- build_node_aes(
        g,
        layout_matrix    = lay,
        node_size_factor = input$node_size_factor,
        label_cex        = input$label_cex
      )

      V(g)$color       <- node_aes$type_cols[node_aes$var_type]
      V(g)$frame.color <- node_aes$frame_col
      V(g)$label.cex   <- node_aes$label_cex
      V(g)$size        <- node_aes$size

      png(file, width = 2200, height = 2200, res = 300)
      plot(
        g,
        layout             = lay,
        vertex.label.color = "black",
        edge.label         = E(g)$label
      )

      ## Edge stat-type legend in PNG
      if (isTRUE(input$show_edge_stat_legend)) {
        types_present <- sort(unique(E(g)$type))
        types_present <- types_present[!is.na(types_present)]

        if (length(types_present) > 0) {
          legend_labels <- stat_legend_map[types_present]
          legend_labels <- legend_labels[!is.na(legend_labels)]

          if (length(legend_labels) > 0) {
            legend(
              "topleft",
              legend = legend_labels,
              bty    = "n",
              cex    = 0.6,
              title  = "Edge stat type"
            )
          }
        }
      }

      ## Node color legend in PNG
      if (isTRUE(input$show_node_type_legend)) {
        node_types_present <- sort(unique(node_aes$var_type))
        node_types_present <- node_types_present[!is.na(node_types_present)]

        if (length(node_types_present) > 0) {
          legend(
            "bottomleft",
            legend = node_types_present,
            pch    = 16,
            col    = node_aes$type_cols[node_types_present],
            bty    = "n",
            cex    = 0.6,
            title  = "Node type"
          )
        }
      }

      dev.off()
    }
  )
}

###---RUN THE GUI---###
shinyApp(ui, server)

```

### this chunk handles the exported association network plot ###
```{r}
# Removed 3 redundant package-loading/install line(s); packages are loaded in the setup section.
## =======================================================================
## Network figure helper: grey edges, node-type legend bottom-right,
## significance "superscripts", optional custom node labels,
## helper table for edge midpoints, quartile points,
## and manual annotate examples with label boxes
## =======================================================================


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Main builder
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
build_network_ggraph <- function(
    obj,
    edge_labels       = TRUE,
    node_label_size   = 4,
    edge_label_size   = 3,
    edge_width_factor = 1,
    node_size_factor  = 1,
    show_legends      = TRUE,
    label_min_weight  = 0.04,
    node_label_map    = NULL   # named vector: c(var = "Pretty label", ...)
) {

  g        <- obj$graph
  lay      <- obj$layout
  nodes_df <- obj$nodes
  edges_df <- obj$edges

  x <- nodes_df$x
  y <- nodes_df$y

  # -------- helper for "superscript-like" significance labels ----------
  sig_superscript <- function(p) {
    case_when(
      is.na(p)        ~ "",
      p < 0.001       ~ "***",
      p < 0.01        ~ "**",
      p < 0.05        ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ "ⁿˢ"          # "ns" as superscript-ish (ⁿˢ)
    )
  }

  # precompute edge label text (weight + sig)
  edges_df <- edges_df %>%
    mutate(
      sig_sup  = sig_superscript(p),
      lab_text = paste0(round(weight, 2), sig_sup)
    )

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Convert igraph → tidygraph and attach aesthetics
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  tg <- as_tbl_graph(g) %>%
    activate(nodes) %>%
    mutate(
      x    = x,
      y    = y,
      type = nodes_df$type,
      size = nodes_df$size * node_size_factor
    ) %>%
    activate(edges) %>%
    mutate(
      weight   = edges_df$weight,
      p        = edges_df$p,
      lab_text = edges_df$lab_text,
      width    = (1 + 4 * pmin(1, abs(weight))) * edge_width_factor,
      label    = ifelse(
        edge_labels & abs(weight) >= label_min_weight,
        lab_text,
        NA_character_
      )
    )

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Node and edge label data
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # node labels – allow custom mapping
  node_label_df <- nodes_df %>%
    mutate(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = if (!is.null(node_label_map)) {
        out  <- name
        hits <- name %in% names(node_label_map)
        out[hits] <- node_label_map[name[hits]]
        out
      } else {
        name
      }
    )

  # always use a data.frame, not NULL
  edge_label_df <- data.frame()

  if (edge_labels && nrow(edges_df) > 0) {
    ed <- as.data.frame(edges_df)

    from_xy <- lay[match(ed$from, nodes_df$name), , drop = FALSE]
    to_xy   <- lay[match(ed$to,   nodes_df$name), , drop = FALSE]

    edge_label_df <- ed %>%
      mutate(
        x = (from_xy[, 1] + to_xy[, 1]) / 2,
        y = (from_xy[, 2] + to_xy[, 2]) / 2,
        label = ifelse(
          abs(weight) >= label_min_weight,
          lab_text,
          NA_character_
        )
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(label))
  }

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build plot — FIXED EDGE COLOR HERE
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  p <- ggraph(tg, layout = "manual", x = x, y = y) +
    geom_edge_link(
      aes(width = width),
      color       = "grey60",       # <-- FIXED, NO MAPPING
      alpha       = 0.85,
      lineend     = "round",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_node_point(
      aes(size = size, fill = type),
      shape = 21,
      color = "black",
      stroke = 1
    ) +
    scale_edge_width(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
    scale_fill_discrete(
      name  = "Node type",
      guide = if (show_legends) "legend" else "none"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(guide = "none") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position      = if (show_legends) c(0.96, 0.06) else "none", # lower-right inside
      legend.justification = c(1, 0),
      legend.background    = element_rect(
        fill      = scales::alpha("white", 0.85),
        colour    = "white",
        linewidth = 0.3
      ),
      legend.title         = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.key.size      = grid::unit(1.3, "lines")   # bigger "bubbles"
    )

  # bump bubble size in legend (fill) only
  if (show_legends) {
    p <- p +
      guides(
        fill = guide_legend(
          override.aes = list(
            size   = 6,    # bigger points in legend
            shape  = 21,
            stroke = 1
          )
        )
      )
  }

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Node labels (repel)
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  p <- p +
    geom_text_repel(
      data          = node_label_df,
      inherit.aes   = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
      size          = node_label_size,
      color         = "black",
      fontface      = "bold",
      max.overlaps  = Inf,
      box.padding   = 1,
      point.padding = 1.5,
      segment.color = NA
    )

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Edge labels (repel) – text with "superscripts", in boxes
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (edge_labels && nrow(edge_label_df) > 0) {
    p <- p +
      geom_label_repel(
        data          = edge_label_df,
        inherit.aes   = FALSE,
        aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
        size          = edge_label_size,
        color         = "black",
        fill          = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
        label.size    = 0.1,
        label.r       = grid::unit(0.1, "lines"),
        max.overlaps  = Inf,
        box.padding   = 0.01,
        point.padding = 0.01,
        segment.color = NA
      )
  }

  return(p)
}

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## BUILD BASE PLOT (no edge labels) + HELPER TABLE OF EDGE MID/QUARTILE POINTS
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------

# Optional: custom display labels for nodes
my_node_labels <- c(
  yield_mtha     = "Yield (MT∙ha^-1)",
  scn_count_rep  = "SCN eggs+J2∙100cm^3",
  mean_fv_ratio  = "F. virguliforme DNA",
  fdx            = "FDX",
  sds_tol        = "SDS tolerance",
  soil_pH        = "Soil pH"
  # add more as needed
)

# 1) build base plot WITHOUT edge labels
p_net_base <- build_network_ggraph(
  pathway_network_object,
  edge_labels       = FALSE,         # <-- OFF
  node_label_size   = 5.5,
  edge_label_size   = 4,
  edge_width_factor = 1,
  node_size_factor  = 1,
  show_legends      = TRUE,
  label_min_weight  = 0.01,
  node_label_map    = NULL
)

p_net_base

# 2) make helper table of midpoints + quartile points + label text
nodes_df <- pathway_network_object$nodes
edges_df <- pathway_network_object$edges

# helper for sig symbols (same logic as in builder)
sig_superscript <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)        ~ "",
    p < 0.001       ~ "***",
    p < 0.01        ~ "**",
    p < 0.05        ~ "*",
    TRUE            ~ "ⁿˢ"
  )
}

edge_midpoints <- edges_df %>%
  mutate(
    sig_sup = sig_superscript(p),
    label   = paste0(round(weight, 2), sig_sup),
    x_from  = nodes_df$x[match(from, nodes_df$name)],
    y_from  = nodes_df$y[match(from, nodes_df$name)],
    x_to    = nodes_df$x[match(to,   nodes_df$name)],
    y_to    = nodes_df$y[match(to,   nodes_df$name)],
    # midpoint (1/2)
    x_mid   = (x_from + x_to) / 2,
    y_mid   = (y_from + y_to) / 2,
    # "quartile points": mid between start & mid (1/4), and mid & end (3/4)
    x_q25   = (x_from + x_mid) / 2,
    y_q25   = (y_from + y_mid) / 2,
    x_q75   = (x_mid + x_to)   / 2,
    y_q75   = (y_mid + y_to)   / 2
  ) %>%
  select(
    from, to, weight, p, label,
    x_from, y_from, x_to, y_to,
    x_q25,  y_q25, x_mid, y_mid, x_q75, y_q75
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(weight)))

edge_midpoints  # <-- inspect this in the console / View()

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## MANUAL ANNOTATE EXAMPLE – move a bunch of edge labels by hand
## (now you can also use x_q25 / x_q75 etc.)
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------

# Example: pick edges to tweak
edge1 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "scn_count_rep", to == "soil_p_h") %>%
  slice(1)

edge2 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "mean_fv_ratio", to == "soil_p_h") %>%
  slice(1)

edge3 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "fdx", to == "soil_p_h") %>%
  slice(1)

edge4 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "soil_p_h") %>%
  slice(1)

edge5 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "mean_fv_ratio", to == "fdx") %>%
  slice(1)

edge6 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "sds_tol", to == "scn_count_rep") %>%
  slice(1)

edge7 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "mean_fv_ratio", to == "scn_count_rep") %>%
  slice(1)

edge8 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "fdx") %>%
  slice(1)

edge9 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "mean_fv_ratio") %>%
  slice(1)

edge10 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "scn_count_rep", to == "fdx") %>%
  slice(1)

edge11 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "sds_tol") %>%
  slice(1)

edge12 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "sds_tol", to == "mean_fv_ratio") %>%
  slice(1)

edge13 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "scn_count_rep") %>%
  slice(1)

edge14 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "yield_mtha", to == "product") %>%
  slice(1)

edge15 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "sds_tol", to == "fdx") %>%
  slice(1)

edge16 <- edge_midpoints %>% 
  filter(from == "fdx", to == "product") %>%
  slice(1)

edge17 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "mean_fv_ratio", to == "product") %>%
  slice(1)

edge18 <- edge_midpoints %>%
  filter(from == "sds_tol", to == "product") %>%
  slice(1)

# start from base network (no automatic edge labels)
p_net_manual <- p_net_base +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge1$x_mid+0.2,   # nudge as needed (could use x_q25 / x_q75)
    y     = edge1$y_mid,
    label = edge1$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge2$x_mid,
    y     = edge2$y_mid,
    label = edge2$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge3$x_q75+0.2,
    y     = edge3$y_q75,
    label = edge3$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge4$x_q25,
    y     = edge4$y_q25,
    label = edge4$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge5$x_q25+0.25,
    y     = edge5$y_q25,
    label = edge5$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge6$x_mid,
    y     = edge6$y_mid,
    label = edge6$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge7$x_mid-0.25,
    y     = edge7$y_mid,
    label = edge7$label,
    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),
    colour     = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x     = edge8$x_mid,
    y     = edge8$y_mid,

    size  = 3.5,
    fontface   = "bold",
    label.size = 0.1,
    fill       = scales::alpha("white", 0.5),

  ) +
  annotate(

    y     = edge12$y_mid,

    size  = 3.5,
```
